state.next-action: `12-02` is complete and `12-03` is underway. The first provider-sync slice is now in place: app-owned staff-admin actions emit first-party auth domain events through a shared helper instead of letting Clerk become the only event surface. Continue `12-03` by wiring inbound Clerk webhooks and reconciliation to the same app-owned contract, then broaden the event sink beyond staff-admin actions as needed. Verification note: focused tests and eslint passed for the domain-event helper slice; local `next build` previously stalled in `Collecting build traces ...` after cache cleanup, so do not treat local build verification as clean until that trace step is resolved.
